content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

1 high-confidence issue found in the new snapshot updates: stale `final_review_planner` remains in run.json final-review snapshots.

## Amendments

1. High: `.ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/run.json` now includes legacy planner state in the newly added final-review stage-resolution snapshots at lines `33-36` (`active_run.stage_resolution_snapshot.final_review_planner`) and `73-76` (`last_stage_resolution_snapshot.final_review_planner`), despite planner being removed from the final-review panel contract. This creates snapshot-schema drift and re-introduces a stale planner role in new run artifacts. See contract expectation that final-review snapshots should only carry `final_review_reviewers` and `final_review_arbiter`.
   Rationale: Regenerate/sanitize this fixture with the current serializer so both snapshot objects omit `final_review_planner`.
